Soft liner provides comfort and reduces pressure on the user's wrist.
Clearance zones ensure the user's fingers can move freely without restriction.

Anchor point for attaching the dorsal control module.
Mounting point for the hand plate, ensuring proper alignment and stability.
Cutout for easy access to finger actuator cartridges and wiring harnesses.

risk.desc: Risk of power and signal lines sharing one tight bundle without separation or shielding.
